title: senecio megaglossus
intro: Senecio megaglossus, also known as the large-leafed ragwort, is a plant species within the daisy family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or decoction for herbal use, although the effectiveness and safety of these preparations are not extensively scientifically documented.
